docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $930.00 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NEGRON LUCY NEGRON GRISELDA AKA CRISTY LOESIGA AKA  GRISELDINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL JEWELERS CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEGRON LUCY NEGRON GRISELDA AKA CRISTY LOESIGA AKA  GRISELDINE $930.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $981.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT NEGRON GRISELDA AKA CRISTY LOESIGA AKA  GRISELDINE HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-1991 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JUL-29-1991, GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT NEGRON GRISELDA AKA CRISTY LOESIGA AKA  GRISELDINE
ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION:THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNING HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
OTHER ORDERS:GRANTED, EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $25 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,113.15 AS TO DEFENDANT NEGRON LUCY NEGRON GRISELDA AKA CRISTY LOESIGA AKA  GRISELDINE
